full_text:
Emperor Shao [Liu Bian] 少帝[劉辯]
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Emperor Shao [Liu Bian] (少帝[劉辯])was born in Luo Yang, Si Li Province. Emperor Shao of Han (AD 189). Deposed and poisoned by Dong Zhuo. Emperor Shao [Liu Bian] was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Emperor Shao [Liu Bian] lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
